heroHeadline: CJNG Crisis Day 56 — USMCA Talks Begin, Spain-Mexico Reset, 15th ICE Death, Sheinbaum Time 100
heroSubtitle: USTR Greer visits Mexico City Apr 16 for USMCA bilateral pre-review; July 1 formal review deadline looms with Mexico's record trade surplus at stake. Sheinbaum meets Spanish PM Sánchez in Barcelona Apr 18 — 'There is no diplomatic crisis' ends years of bilateral tension. 15th Mexican national dies in US ICE custody (Apr 13); Mexico orders daily consular visits to detention centers. Sheinbaum named to TIME 100 Most Influential People (Apr 19). El Mayo sentencing now May 18. CJNG succession stable under O3. World Cup opens June 11 — 53 days out.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all Mexico-based Watchboard trackers. Data sourced from SEDENA, SESNSP, InSight Crime, OHCHR, and major international outlets.
